summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new AgriPOS features: 1) AccountsPage (/accounts) - user management with PIN, 2) EmployeesPage (/employees) - full profiles with CA tracking, 3) Admin PIN bypass on credit sales, 4) Employee Advance category in Accounting with CA summary panel. All 20 backend tests pass and all 14 frontend tests pass.

issues: Dev environment console warning: '<span> cannot be child of <tbody>' and '<tr> cannot be child of <span>' — same visual editor injection issue seen in iteration_22 and 23. Not a production issue.

action_items: CLEANUP: testcashier_ui user was created during UI testing (added to DB) - consider cleanup
CLEANUP: UI Test Employee was created during UI testing - consider cleanup
MINOR: Dev environment console warnings about <span> injected inside <tbody>/<tr> (same as iterations 22-23, not production issue)
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: AccountsPage list_users query uses {active: True} filter — newly deactivated users won't show in the list. This is intentional but worth documenting. Consider adding an 'Include Inactive' toggle for admin review.

MINOR: The CA summary endpoint uses db.expenses collection to sum advances by date. If expenses don't have a consistent 'date' format (YYYY-MM-DD), the comparison may fail silently. The code uses string comparison for dates.

OBSERVATION: handleCreditSale admin bypass (line ~466) only checks paymentType !== 'cash' OR credit limit exceeded. Walk-in (no customer) partial checkout also shows the checkout form without PIN - this is expected behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created 'testcashier_ui' (UI Test Cashier, Cashier role) user and 'UI Test Employee' employee (monthly_ca_limit=5000) during testing. Both are in the database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully working: 1) /accounts page has user table, New User dialog (role/branch/PIN), PIN set/clear flow - all verified. 2) /employees page has dashboard stats, Add Employee dialog with CA limit/government IDs, employee card click opens detail modal with Profile + Cash Advances tabs (showing This Month/Limit/Balance/Progress bar). 3) Admin/manager bypass on credit sales - confirmed no PIN dialog on /sales-new when user is admin. 4) Accounting Employee Advance: when category='Employee Advance' selected, employee picker (amber section) appears; selecting employee shows CA summary (3-column grid: This Month, Monthly Limit, Unpaid Balance). Navigation sidebar shows 'Employees' (Briefcase icon) and 'Accounts' (UserCog icon) at the bottom. Working credentials: owner/secure123.
